raw_consumer_statement:
I have a dispute with a vendor " XXXX XXXX XXXX ''. This company was hired to create a brick paver circular driveway. The company did not finish the work and also failed to pay for the brick pavers ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  ) as per the contract. I paid an initial downpayment of {$8600.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXX via check and then three payments via credit card in the amounts of {$8600.00}, {$4300.00}, and {$3800.00}. The total amount of invoice was approximately {$21000.00}. The company " XXXX XXXX XXXX '' did not provide a " notice to homeowner '' that is required for vendors to inform homeowners that they are responsible for payment to supplier if vendor does not pay. XXXX XXXX XXXX  did not pay for the pavers and I received an email from company " XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX' notifying me that XXXX XXXX XXXX did not pay for the pavers and therefore I would have a lien placed against my home. I then paid the supplier approximately {$9300.00}, also via the same credit card. I paid via the same credit card so that they would see that XXXX XXXX XXXX did not pay the vendor as per the contract. In addition, the current job is not complete and I have an estimate from another paver company for approximately {$8000.00} to fix and finish the driveway. I have exhausted my efforts with Barclay Bank to help me reverse these charges but Barclay Credit Card after two months have been unhelpful.

Please help me with this issue.
